final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow fundraising deck announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end Chinese domestic 路演 / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy and presenter credit
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative atmosphere fitting a top-tier GP fundraising event — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with institutional Chinese tech-finance 路演 tonality — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "演讲人：Sam Altman" (presenter credit)
Constraints: must conform to Chinese domestic 路演 / GP pitch deck conventions — layout, hierarchy, and formality level must reflect that context
Avoid:
